scripts.cap:android: vite build && cap sync android && cap open android
scripts.cap:android:run: vite build && cap sync android && cap run android
scripts.android:bundle-debug: vite build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleDebug --no-daemon
scripts.android:bundle-release: vite build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease --no-daemon
